name: Warm Broccoli Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups broccoli florets, fresh or frozen
3 slices bacon, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring 1 inch of water to a boil. Add the broccoli and return the water to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer covered until crisp-tender, about 2-3 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat, cook the bacon until nearly crisp, about 4 minutes. Add the onion and cook, stirring frequently, until it is crisp-tender and the bacon is crisp, about 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Stir in the vinegar and cook, stirring constantly, until the vinegar has reduced by half, about 30 seconds.
4. Add the mushrooms, salt, and reserved broccoli; toss to coat. Serve immediately while slightly warm.
Yields 4 to 6 portions; 6 cups
Variation - substitute balsamic vinegar.
